item.text: I’ll use Zap, clear the 1 HP raider, put capped damage into the next center raider, and spend the large supply lead on two fresh raiders if allowed.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-029.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-029\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-029.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-029.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-029.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-029\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-021-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-025-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-027-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-029-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-029-2\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":0}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-021-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-022-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-025-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-024-1\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-029.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-029.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-029.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-029.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-029.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Zap, removed P2'"'s wounded raider, heavily damaged the next center raider, advanced reinforcements, and recruited two raiders.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: use Zap damage immediately, clear the easy 1 HP threat, leave the next P2 center raider nearly dead, and spend the supply lead on maximum immediate board pressure.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-029.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-029.board.result.json"'

/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-029.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-029\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-029.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-029.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-029.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-029\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-021-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-025-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-027-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-029-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-029-2\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":0}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-021-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-022-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-025-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-024-1\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-029.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-029.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-029.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-029.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-029.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Zap, removed P2'"'s wounded raider, heavily damaged the next center raider, advanced reinforcements, and recruited two raiders.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: use Zap damage immediately, clear the easy 1 HP threat, leave the next P2 center raider nearly dead, and spend the supply lead on maximum immediate board pressure.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-029.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-029.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-029`.

Deck line: played `zap`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `6` money and `1` damage.

Board line: moved raiders to `(7,6)`, `(6,5)`, and `(8,3)`, recruited two raiders at `(10,1)` and `(11,0)`, removed `P2-raider-turn-022-1`, and dealt `7` damage to `P2-raider-turn-024-1`.

Rationale: Zap enabled immediate pressure, P1 cleared the wounded raider, left the next center raider at 1 HP, and converted the supply lead into maximum board presence. Strict validation passed.
